stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Establish reader/compute/writer plumbing and row-order writeback before stats math.
stages.stage_notes: Stage 1 keeps compute trivial: copy input to output, preserve tile traversal order, and ensure final-width masking works on tail shapes.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.
Check triage log at /tmp/tt-test-triage-dev0.log for more details. Verify all three kernels (reader/compute/writer) are making progress.

stages.name: mean_reduce
stages.description: Verify masked row-mean accumulation with temporary one-tile-wide output.
stages.stage_notes: Temporary output spec is one tile wide. Compare only column 0 because REDUCE_ROW produces a COL-shaped tile.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.
Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.
Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.

stages.name: invstd_reduce
stages.description: Lock the row-stat finalization path: variance, epsilon add, and rsqrt with one-tile-wide output.
stages.stage_notes: Still uses temporary one-tile-wide output. This stage should finish c_26/c_27 accumulation and produce c_28 invstd correctly.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Return full-shape output and verify mean subtraction plus invstd broadcast without optional tensors.
stages.stage_notes: Stage 4 restores the final full-shape output contract and validates final-width masking after normalization.

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.

stages.name: residual_affine
stages.description: Add residual reread and row-broadcast affine streams on top of the base normalization path.
stages.reference_body:
x = input_tensor.float() + residual_tensor.float()
    return torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, (x.shape[-1],), weight=weight_tensor.float().reshape(-1), bias=bias_tensor.float().reshape(-1), eps=1e-5)
stages.stage_notes: All optional tensors are enabled in this stage so the reader and compute kernels must exercise every new stream/path before acceptance.
stages.extra_setup:
gamma_shape = [1] * len(shape)
    gamma_shape[-1] = shape[-1]
    torch_residual = torch.randn(shape, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    torch_weight = torch.randn(tuple(gamma_shape), dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    torch_bias = torch.randn(tuple(gamma_shape), dtype=torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
ttnn_residual = ttnn.from_torch(torch_residual, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    ttnn_weight = ttnn.from_torch(torch_weight, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    ttnn_bias = ttnn.from_torch(torch_bias, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: acceptance
stages.description: Full parameter cross-product validation on the public layer_norm wrapper.
stages.reference_body:
x = input_tensor.float()
    x = x if residual_tensor is None else x + residual_tensor.float()
    w = None if weight_tensor is None else weight_tensor.float().reshape(-1)
    b = None if bias_tensor is None else bias_tensor.float().reshape(-1)
    return torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, (x.shape[-1],), weight=w, bias=b, eps=epsilon)
stages.stage_notes: Acceptance should only exercise already-implemented paths. No new kernel code belongs in this stage.
stages.extra_setup:
gamma_shape = [1] * len(shape)
    gamma_shape[-1] = shape[-1]
    torch_residual = torch.randn(shape, dtype=torch.bfloat16) if use_residual else None
    torch_weight = torch.randn(tuple(gamma_shape), dtype=torch.bfloat16) if use_weight else None
    torch_bias = torch.randn(tuple(gamma_shape), dtype=torch.bfloat16) if use_bias else None
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
ttnn_residual = ttnn.from_torch(torch_residual, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) if torch_residual is not None else None
    ttnn_weight = ttnn.from_torch(torch_weight, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) if torch_weight is not None else None
    ttnn_bias = ttnn.from_torch(torch_bias, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=layout, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) if torch_bias is not None else None
